config.script:
areaName = self.props.value
	lineList = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Report/HPR_Report/Line_Name", {'AreaName': areaName})
	system.perspective.print(lineList)  # Debugging
	# Convert the dataset to a list of strings
	lineListConverted = [row[0] for row in lineList]  # Adjust column index as needed
	system.perspective.print(lineListConverted)  # Debugging to verify the list
	self.getSibling("drpLine").props.value = lineListConverted

self.getSibling("drpUser").props.value=-1
	self.getSibling("drpStatus").props.value=-1
	self.getSibling("dateFrom").props.value=''
	self.getSibling("dateTo").props.value=''
	self.parent.parent.getChild("flexTable").getChild("Table").props.data=''
	msgStrip = self.parent.parent.getChild("msgStrip")
	msgStrip.props.text = ''  # Clear the text
	msgStrip.props.style = {}  # Reset the style to an empty dictionary
	self.parent.parent.getChild("msgStrip").props.style.borderStyle=True

try:
       # Get the table data
       table_data = self.parent.parent.getChild("flexTable").getChild("Table").props.data
       
       # Initialize message text
       message_text = ""
   
       # Check if the table contains data
       if table_data is not None and len(table_data) > 0:
           try:
               # If data is available, export it to Excel and trigger download
               excel_data = system.dataset.toExcel(True, [table_data])
               system.perspective.download(fileName="AuditReportEECD.xlsx", data=excel_data)
               message = "Audit Report download successful to your local system in Excel format."
               setMessage("Success", message)
           except Exception as e:
               # Handle errors during Excel export or download
               system.perspective.print("Error during export or download: %s" % str(e))
               message = "An error occurred during export. Please try again or contact MES team"
               setMessage("Error", message)
       else:
           # Handle case where no data is available
           message = "No data available to export for given Inputs."
           setMessage("Error", message)
   
   except Exception as e:
       # Handle unexpected errors in the overall script
       system.perspective.print("Unexpected error: %s" % str(e))
       setMessage("Error", "An unexpected error occurred. Please Contact MES team")

def setMessage(status, message):
    system.perspective.sendMessage(
        messageType="setMessage",
        payload={
            "message": message,
            "status": status
        },
        scope="view"
    )

transforms.code:
if value:  # Check if the dataset is not empty
    return "Count: {}".format(len(value))  # Returns the number of rows with the label "Count:"
 return "Count: 0"

messageHandlers.script:
# Get the parameters from the message
	message = payload['message']  
	status = payload['status']
	
	# Update the Text Field's text
	self.props.text = message
	self.meta.visible=True
	# Apply the style class (from the payload or a default value)
	self.props.style.classes = "Project_VECV/Reports/successMsg" if status=='Success' else "Project_VECV/Common/StatusBlinking/Hold"
